clear_sheet.description: Clears all rows on an existing sheet.

headerRow.description: Enter the row number where your column headers are located (usually row 1).

includeTeamDrives.description: Turn this on to also see spreadsheets from Shared Drives.

auth.description:
Authenticate via service account from https://console.cloud.google.com/ > IAM & Admin > Service Accounts > Create Service Account > Keys > Add key.

You can optionally use domain-wide delegation (https://support.google.com/a/answer/162106?hl=en#zippy=%2Cset-up-domain-wide-delegation-for-a-client) to access spreadsheets without adding the service account to each one.

**Note:** Without a user email, the service account only has access to files/folders you explicitly share with it.

userEmail.description: Email address of the user to impersonate for domain-wide delegation.

sheetId.description: The ID of the worksheet to use.

markdown.description:
**Notes:**

- Memory key is used to remember where last row was processed and will be used in the following runs.
- Republishing the flow **keeps** the memory key value, If you want to start over **change** the memory key.

memKey.description: The key used to store the current row number in memory

spreadsheetId.description: The ID of the spreadsheet to use.

useHeaderNames.description: Map A/B/C… to the actual column headers (row specified above).

google-sheets-insert-multiple-rows.description: Add multiple rows of data at once to a specific spreadsheet.

as_string.description: Inserted values that are dates and formulas will be entered as strings and have no effect

check_for_duplicate.description: Enable this option to check for duplicate values before inserting data into the sheet. Only unique rows will be added based on the selected column.

includeTeamDrives.description: Turn this on to also see spreadsheets from Shared Drives.

input_type.description: Select the format of the input values to be added into the worksheet.

overwrite.description: Enable this option to replace all existing data in the sheet with new data from your input. This will clear any extra rows beyond the updated range.

auth.description:
Authenticate via service account from https://console.cloud.google.com/ > IAM & Admin > Service Accounts > Create Service Account > Keys > Add key.

You can optionally use domain-wide delegation (https://support.google.com/a/answer/162106?hl=en#zippy=%2Cset-up-domain-wide-delegation-for-a-client) to access spreadsheets without adding the service account to each one.

**Note:** Without a user email, the service account only has access to files/folders you explicitly share with it.

userEmail.description: Email address of the user to impersonate for domain-wide delegation.

sheetId.description: The ID of the worksheet to use.

trigger_column.description:
Trigger on changes to cells in this column only. 
Select **Any Column** if you want the flow to trigger on changes to any cell within the row.

includeTeamDrives.description: Turn this on to also see spreadsheets from Shared Drives.
